name: Billing Orchestrator
workflow: An AI agent monitors failed payments, drafts recovery actions, and routes exceptions into a human review queue.

name: Support Triage Copilot
workflow: Incoming support threads are summarized, classified, and prioritized by an agent before escalation.

name: Client Onboarding Grid
workflow: The agent coordinates onboarding checklists, confirms document receipt, and triggers welcome communications.

name: Founder Daily Brief
workflow: A planning agent consolidates project updates, surfaces blockers, and writes a daily executive brief.
